chapter_title.en: Chapter 90 – The shade for the one in Ihraam

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/305)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/305)
text: لَا بَأْسَ بِالْقُبَّةِ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ وَ الصِّبْيَانِ وَ هُمْ مُحْرِمُونَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Al Kahily,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘There is no problem with the tent upon the women and the children, and they are in Ihraam’.
en.sarwar: 10. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from al-Kahiliy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is not harmful for women and children to have a dome (umbrella) while they are in the state of Ihram.’”
